title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CA-7
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CA-7 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CA-7 in the Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring family. The control title for CA-7 is Continuous Monitoring. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: IR-2 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, IR-2, belongs to the Incident Response family and is titled Incident Response Training. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
